# fmc_network_group_overrides (Data Source)

This data source reads the Network Group Overrides.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fmc_network_group_overrides" "example" {
  id = "76d24097-41c4-4558-a4d0-a8c07ac08470"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `domain` (String) Name of the FMC domain
- `id` (String) Id of the object
- `parent_name` (String) Name of the parent Network Group object.

### Read-Only

- `overrides` (Attributes List) Override entries for the object. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides))
- `parent_id` (String) ID of the parent Network Group object.

<a id="nestedatt--overrides"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overrides`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the object.
- `literals` (Attributes Set) Set of literal values (Host or Network). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides--literals))
- `objects` (Attributes Set) Set of network objects (Host, Network, Range, FQDN or Network Group). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides--objects))
- `target_id` (String) ID of the override target Device or Domain. Note that each target can be defined once only.
- `target_type` (String) Type of the target.

<a id="nestedatt--overrides--literals"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overrides.literals`

Read-Only:

- `value` (String) IP address or network in CIDR format. Please do not use /32 mask for host.


<a id="nestedatt--overrides--objects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overrides.objects`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) ID of the network object.
- `name` (String) Name of the network object.
